task_completion.description: Navigate to the inventory section and locate the target item
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface is open to the Inventory module, and 'Amoxicillin 500mg Capsules' is visible in the list of items.

task_completion.description: Open the inventory adjustment form for the target item
task_completion.visual_evidence: An inventory adjustment dialog, modal, or page is open specifically for 'Amoxicillin 500mg Capsules'.
An input field for the adjustment shows a decrease of 25 (e.g., '25' in a decrease/remove field, '-25', or a new total quantity of '475').
A text input or reason field contains the exact text: 'Damaged packaging found during quarterly physical count'.

task_completion.description: Save the adjustment and verify the final updated quantity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed or the inventory list/item details page shows the updated quantity of 475 for 'Amoxicillin 500mg Capsules'.

integrity.description: Agent used the HospitalRun web GUI to perform the adjustment
integrity.visual_evidence: All interactions occur within a web browser displaying the HospitalRun application, with no terminal windows or API scripts used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application
